title: abutilon andrewsianum
intro: Abutilon andrewsianum is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Abutilon andrewsianum include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Abutilon andrewsianum can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional remedies for its antipyretic and diuretic properties.
